assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (webpack) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md line 29 shows 'Upstream Affected Component | webpack' and line 33 shows the JQL query 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND cf[10632] ~ "webpack" AND key != TC-8011', directly extracting webpack from customfield_10632 and using it in the search.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 49-53 show explicit filter validation: 'PS Component match: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui == pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui -- MATCH' and 'Stream match: rhtpa-2.2 == rhtpa-2.2 -- MATCH'. Custom field IDs customfield_10669 and customfield_10832 are shown in the TC-8012 data table on lines 45-47.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8012 to find remediation task TC-8013 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 58-60: 'TC-8012 has the following issue links:' followed by '**Depend**: TC-8013 (remediation Task)'. The traversal explicitly follows the Depend link type from TC-8012 to TC-8013.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (5.96.1) against the current CVE's fix threshold (5.98.0) and determines the fix does NOT cover this CVE
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 74-79 show the Coverage Comparison table: 'Existing remediation bump target | 5.96.1 (TC-8013)', 'Current CVE fix threshold | 5.98.0 (CVE-2026-45678)', 'Comparison | 5.96.1 < 5.98.0', 'Covers this CVE? | NO'.

assertion_results.text: The overlap table is presented to the engineer showing TC-8012 and TC-8013 with 'Covers This CVE? = No' — the triage proceeds to create new remediation tasks rather than recommending closure
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 87-89 show the conclusion table with TC-8012, TC-8013, bump version 5.96.1, and 'Covers This CVE? = No (threshold: 5.98.0)'. Line 91 states 'A new remediation task must be created to bump webpack to >= 5.98.0.' triage-outcome.md line 5 confirms 'Decision: Case A -- Affected. Create new remediation tasks.' and Step 8 (lines 48-61) describes creating two new remediation tasks.
